name: SegmentedControl
description: Pill tab switcher — a group of equal-width segments in a weak-bg track, with one active segment raised via white background + shadow. Supports label-only, icon+label, and icon-only segments.
sourceNote: Promoted out of Filter into its own folder now that it supports icon variants (Left-Icon/Only-Icon types from Figma) and a per-item disabled state — a standalone reusable primitive beyond FilterBar's original use. Hover is a real :hover rule (text color only, no background change, matching Figma's Hover trace which does not add the active white-bg+shadow treatment).

items.type: { label?: ReactNode, value: string, icon?: string, disabled?: boolean, ariaLabel?: string }[]
